title: runo plum Announces New EP Bloom Again: Hear “Butterflies”
author: Danielle Chelosky
summary:

The post runo plum Announces New EP <em>Bloom Again</em>: Hear “Butterflies” appeared first on Stereogum.
full_text:
Last year, runo plum charmed us all with her debut album patching. Now the Minnesota singer-songwriter is back with the announcement of a new EP called Bloom Again. The melancholy acoustic ballad "Butterflies" is out today.

"You might assume it's about the giddy feelings of having nervous butterflies when you have a crush, and I suppose it is, but it's more so about those feelings being crushed, and not knowing what to do with those feelings," the artist says. "I recorded the main guitars and vocals in my home studio in my apartment in Minneapolis, and Philip Brooks added drums, guitar and bass at their home studio in Germany, they have a way of adding depth to songs that feels so magical. It’s a really tender song I wrote during the period when I wrote patching."

Watch the music video below.

TRACKLIST:
01 "butterflies" 
02 "salt and soap"
03 "be gentle with me (acoustic)" 
04 "pink moon"
05 "monarch"
06 "bloom again"

Bloom Again is out 5/8 on Winspear. Pre-order it here.
